header.title: Request a Quotation
header.description: Tell us about your project and receive a detailed, no-obligation quote from our experienced team.

trustIndicators.title: Fast Quotes
trustIndicators.description: Detailed quotations within 48 hours of your request

trustIndicators.title: Certified Team
trustIndicators.description: All quotations backed by certified electricians with 15+ years experience

trustIndicators.title: Transparent Pricing
trustIndicators.description: Detailed cost breakdown with zero hidden charges or surprises

trustIndicators.title: Professional Assessment
trustIndicators.description: Comprehensive site assessment included in every quotation

items.question: How long does it take to receive a quotation?
items.answer: We typically respond within 2-5 business days with a detailed quotation. Urgent projects may receive faster responses.

items.question: Is the quotation free?
items.answer: Yes, all quotations are completely free and come with no obligation. Complex projects may require a site visit.

items.question: What information do you need from me?
items.answer: The more detail you can provide about your project, the more accurate our quotation will be. Include scope, timeline, and any specific requirements.

items.question: Do you handle all types of electrical work?
items.answer: Yes, we handle residential, commercial, and industrial projects of all sizes, from simple installations to complete electrical systems.
